overview: Kern Endocrine Center provides state-of-the-art care for endocrine conditions including diabetes, thyroid disorders, hormonal imbalances, and weight management. Same-day in-person and telehealth appointments are available.
highlights: Continuous glucose monitoring and insulin pump options
Accepts nearly all major insurance plans
targetAudience: Patients with endocrine disorders including diabetes, thyroid conditions, PCOS, hormonal imbalances, and weight concerns.
